Params: {1: 'Once a dream did weave a shade', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront48.png', 7: '-2.5', 10: '1'}
{3: 'The moment you pass through the rift, the blur of light and shadow rapidly solidifies into a clear scene.'}
{3: 'The air smells like soil and flowers. Sunlight filters through the leaves and lands on a small forest path. The warmth puts a soft golden edge on everything.'}
{3: 'Alpha knows this place. She\'s run through these woods countless times, laughing. She\'s listened to cicadas singing in the trees. She\'s chased the path of butterflies in the air.'}
{3: 'It\'s like the disasters never happened. Everything looks the way it used to.'}
{3: 'Except for one thing. Far off on the horizon, that huge twisted building is still there. Its outline is clearer now—a sign you and Alpha are getting closer to Shadow.'}
{3: 'You recognize it too. You\'ve seen this place before on a mission with the Cerberus squad. Back then, it was all ruins.'}
{3: 'Then, behind you, a voice calls out. Gentle, hesitant, like it can\'t quite believe what it\'s seeing.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha stiffens for a split second. Then she slowly turns around.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A woman with long black hair and a gentle face stands there, staring at you both. Her eyes are full of surprise, confusion, and a happiness she doesn\'t dare fully trust.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The word feels strange on Alpha\'s tongue—one she hasn\'t spoken in years, lingering in her throat.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A mother can recognize her child at a glance, no matter how much they\'ve changed.'}
{3: 'The woman steps closer and reaches out to touch Alpha\'s cheek.'}
{3: 'Alpha instinctively steps back half a pace.'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'You\'re home and you didn\'t tell me?', 4: '3', 18: '100017318'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Come here. Let me look at you.', 4: '3', 18: '100017319'}
{3: 'She rests her hand on Alpha like it\'s the most natural thing in the world, then presses her forehead to Alpha\'s, the way she used to.'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Mm... you\'ve changed so much, but you still feel like you.', 4: '3', 18: '100017320'}
{3: 'It\'s the same familiar touch, one she\'s felt more times than she can count.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mother', 3: 'A story, huh... Lucia, do you want one too?', 4: '1', 18: '100017324'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Mother gently presses her forehead against Lucia\'s.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mother', 3: 'Water-gun fight with Luna again? Let me see... you\'re soaked.', 4: '2', 18: '100017328'}
{3: 'Mother leans down and touches foreheads with Lucia.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Mother lifts Lucia as she steps out of her room, still half asleep, and presses her forehead close to Lucia\'s.'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Let me see who\'s still not awake.', 4: '2', 18: '100017330'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Go wash your face. Breakfast is ready.', 4: '2', 18: '100017331'}
{1: 'Memories hit Alpha like a wave and pull her under.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 7: '-4', 10: '1'}
{1: 'They don\'t care if she resists. They don\'t care if she backs away.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 10: '1'}
{1: 'They only repeat one truth in the gentlest way possible:', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 10: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Her mother\'s voice pulls Alpha out of the flashback.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mother', 3: 'And who\'s this with you? Introduce your friend to me.', 4: '1', 18: '100017333'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Come on. Let\'s go home. Dinner\'s almost ready.', 4: '1', 18: '100017336'}
{3: 'The three of you walk up the forest path toward a house at the end of the trail.'}
{3: 'The walk is short. Along the way, her mother talks softly, giving Alpha gentle reminders and sharing what\'s been going on at home.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mother', 3: 'Your sister\'s out right now, and your dad\'s away on a trip.', 4: '1', 18: '100017337'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Even if you\'re a Construct now, and stronger than me, you still need to take care of yourself day to day.', 4: '1', 18: '100017338'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Don\'t stay up late. Boil your water. Drink more warm water.', 4: '1', 18: '100017339'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Don\'t spend money like it grows on trees. Save some.', 4: '1', 18: '100017341'}
{3: 'You listen quietly and look around as you walk.'}
{3: 'You notice something small. Every now and then, her mother\'s eyes go slightly unfocused.'}
{3: 'The door opens and you all step inside.'}
{3: 'The house feels warm and cozy. It\'s almost exactly like what Alpha remembers.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mother', 3: 'Make yourselves comfortable. I\'ll get some tea.', 4: '1', 18: '100017343'}
{3: 'Alpha\'s eyes drift up to the second floor. That\'s where she used to share a room with Luna.'}
{3: 'She was still a child when the Punishing outbreak hit.'}
{3: 'Now she suddenly wants to know what "Lucia\'s" room looks like here, as an adult.'}
{3: 'Will it be the same as that world where I became a warrior at F.O.S. College?'}
{3: 'Alpha walks upstairs in silence. At the top, she hesitates, then opens the door on the right.'}
{3: 'A young woman\'s bedroom comes into view. It\'s unfamiliar, yet it feels strangely intimate.'}
{3: 'There\'s a bed, a desk, a small sofa, and a TV. Everything is neat and clean, but the room feels empty, like no one\'s lived here for a long time.'}
{3: 'The corkboard is covered with photos in different sizes. Alpha steps closer and looks through them one by one.'}
{3: 'The photos start to piece together "Lucia\'s" life here.'}
{3: 'A family photo at an elementary school gate. Lucia has long hair and a school uniform.'}
{3: 'Another photo. Lucia has twin ponytails and a different uniform, eating breakfast. It looks like middle school.'}
{3: 'After that, the background changes to a hospital.'}
{3: 'She grows thinner, but her eyes are still bright. She\'s trying hard to smile for the camera.'}
{3: 'In another photo, Lucia wears a hospital gown and sits in a wheelchair, looking up at an apricot tree in the hospital garden.'}
{3: 'Later photos show Lucia as a Construct. You can tell it\'s a Lotus frame. She no longer looks sick in these.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha looks away from the photo wall and goes to the desk. She opens a drawer and finds a camcorder inside.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'She connects it to the TV. The screen lights up with home video.'}
{3: 'The footage is a bit shaky. On a lawn, a little girl, maybe four or five, runs around happily in a cute dress.'}
{3: 'Off-screen, you hear the mother\'s younger voice, full of laughter.'}
{3: 'The little girl giggles, stumbles toward the camera, and falls into her mother\'s arms.'}
{3: 'Lucia learning to ride a bike for the first time, trying not to fall.'}
{3: 'At a birthday party, her face covered in frosting.'}
{3: 'Sunset fills the room. Lucia, about eight, sits at her desk. The light turns her black hair red.'}
{3: 'Even then, her face looks calm and serious for her age.'}
{3: 'Lucia sets her book down and turns to the camera.'}
{3: 'The camera moves closer to young Lucia. Someone extends their hand from outside the screen, placing a fruit plate on the desk.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'A storybook. It tells the tale of a great queen from the past. In her kingdom, there lived a group of deities in the heavens.', 4: '15', 18: '100017385'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'When the deities were unhappy, they would bring down torrential rains or summon fierce storms.', 4: '15', 18: '100017386'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Her people suffered greatly because of the deities\' unpredictable moods.', 4: '15', 18: '100017387'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'So, the queen decided to search for the legendary crown that could stand against the deities.', 4: '15', 18: '100017388'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'After enduring countless hardships, she finally found it.', 4: '15', 18: '100017389'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'When the queen put on the crown, she didn\'t drive the deities away.', 4: '15', 18: '100017390'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Instead, she said to them, "If you wish to bring disaster, let it fall upon me. Do not harm my people."', 4: '15', 18: '100017391'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Moved by her spirit, the deities decided never to trouble the people again.', 4: '15', 18: '100017392'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'And what kind of person does Lucia want to become when she grows up?', 18: '100017396'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Young Lucia thinks for a moment, then looks straight into the lens, like she\'s looking through the screen at Alpha.'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'When I grow up, I want to be...', 4: '15', 18: '100017349'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The TV shuts off. The screen goes dark, reflecting Alpha\'s face back at her.'}
{3: 'She doesn\'t turn around, but she knows you\'ve been standing in the doorway for a while.'}
{2: 'I was going to help your mom in the kitchen.', 3: '353'}
{2: 'But she said you didn\'t look right, so she asked me to check on you.', 3: '354'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'I remember once... in the greenhouse. I pointed at a yellow flower and asked her what it was.', 4: '1', 18: '100017353'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Later I realized most people only remember the white fluff. Almost nobody remembers the flower.', 4: '1', 18: '100017355'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'One gust and it\'s gone. I hate that.', 4: '1', 18: '100017357'}
{3: 'Alpha is usually sealed off, like solid ice. Even now, she can\'t say what she means directly. She circles around it.'}
{2: 'Alpha', 3: 'Would you... remember the dandelion\'s flower? Not just the fluff.', 4: '1', 18: '100017358'}
{3: 'Her mother\'s voice calls up from downstairs, just like years ago. Nothing about it has changed.'}
{3: 'Dinner is a full spread of home cooking, steaming hot. The three of you sit around the table under warm yellow light.'}
{3: 'Alpha eats very little, like she doesn\'t know what to do with a scene this normal.'}
{3: 'Her mother keeps looking at Alpha with soft eyes and tries to put more food on her plate.'}
{3: 'Alpha doesn\'t respond. She just quietly eats what\'s already in her bowl.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mother', 3: '【kuroname】, so, are you in the military?', 4: '1', 18: '100017362'}
{3: 'Alpha\'s mother smiles as she looks at you, sitting beside her daughter.'}
{3: 'Alpha hesitates a moment before she says it out loud.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mother', 3: 'How were you doing? Was it hard for you?', 4: '1', 18: '100017365'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha freezes. She wasn\'t expecting that question at all.'}
{3: 'No one has ever asked her that. For a moment, she doesn\'t know what to say.'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'I know you\'re not the Lucia I remember. But I still want to know what kind of life you\'ve lived.', 4: '1', 18: '100017367'}
{3: 'The truth everyone has been avoiding gets said out loud. The table goes quiet.'}
{3: 'Under the warm light, Alpha starts talking. She tells her past. It goes on for a long time.'}
{3: 'By the time she finishes, the table has been cleared.'}
{3: 'The house feels like a safe harbor, but you both still have to move on.'}
{3: 'She stands and takes an old Polaroid camera from a nearby cabinet.', 5: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Mother', 3: 'Come on. Before you go, let\'s take a picture. Just... something to remember this "home" by.', 4: '1', 18: '100017373'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Alpha looks like she wants to refuse. But under her mother\'s gentle, stubborn stare, she joins you at her mother\'s side.'}
{3: 'Under the warm light, the photo slowly slides out. Her mother is smiling. Alpha looks tense. You stand on the other side.'}
{3: 'The three of you stand close. For a moment, it really looks like a family photo.'}
{3: 'You take the photo, gather your things, and get ready to go. The mother walks you to the door.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Before Alpha steps out, she looks back. Her mother is watching her with gentle eyes.'}
{3: 'She steps closer and lightly holds your hand, the way someone would with a child leaving on a long trip.'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'She may... look cold, and she doesn\'t talk much. But she let you walk this far with her. That means... you matter to her, more than she\'d ever admit.', 4: '1', 18: '100017376'}
{2: 'Mother', 3: 'Please, keep an eye on her from here on out. There are things she can\'t say, but... you understand her, don\'t you?', 4: '1', 18: '100017377'}
{3: 'She smiles, satisfied, and turns to Alpha.'}
{1: 'You\'ll meet people you\'ll love, and people who\'ll love you back.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront48.png', 5: '100017378', 6: '1', 7: '-3'}
{1: 'Be a little more honest with yourself, Lucia.', 2: 'ffffffff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront48.png', 5: '100017379', 6: '1', 7: '-1'}
